layers.title: Sampling protocol fields
layers.summary: The change replaces the old scalar log-rate response with a structured sampling config and carries request sampling state semantics through RPC metadata. This is the base layer consumed by client registration, heartbeat, and cross-process trace propagation.

layers.title: Public configuration surface
layers.summary: On top of the protocol layer, the embedded worker configuration API and deploy-time config move from a per-second limit to three 0.0-1.0 sampling ratios. Operator docs and Helm values expose the same request, access, and diagnostic knobs, including request-only derivation rules.

layers.title: Sampler core and logging
layers.summary: The logging backend deletes the old first-N `LogRateLimiter` and adds `LogSampler`, immutable snapshots, precomputed thresholds, proto conversion, and startup/shutdown integration. Runtime log macros and spdlog message construction call the sampler before payload formatting so sampled-out request logs can avoid hot-path work.

layers.title: Lazy access recording
layers.summary: The access recorder is rebuilt as typed object, stream, and request-out facades layered over sampler guards. Callers now provide references or deferred providers, so dropped access logs avoid elapsed-time work, request parameter materialization, string formatting, and exporter writes.

layers.title: Client and worker integration
layers.summary: With the sampler and recorder in place, SDK, C API, Java, Python binding, object cache, stream cache, worker, ETCD, and RPC paths switch their access logging to the new facades. Register and heartbeat responses now apply or publish `LogSampleConfigPb`, while request metadata propagation uses the new request-sampling semantics.

layers.title: Design and operator docs
layers.summary: The repository context gains a dedicated design document and routing entries for unified class-based random sampling. User-facing Chinese docs remove `log_rate_limit` guidance and describe the new three-rate model, derivation behavior, and dscli/deployment usage.
layers.diff:
@@ -47,6 +47,7 @@ Use it to jump from a question type
+| design unified class-based random log sampling | `modules/infra/logging/log-sampler-design.md` | `src/datasystem/common/log/*`, `src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/*`, `src/datasystem/common/metrics/hard_disk_exporter/*`, `src/datasystem/common/util/gflag/*` |
@@ -110,25 +110,57 @@ openYuanrong datasystem 的日志分为以下类型：
-大流量场景下，可通过 `log_rate_limit` 参数控制每秒采样请求数，避免高频请求日志产生过多磁盘 I/O。
+LogSampler 提供统一随机哈希阈值采样，替代旧的 `log_rate_limit` first-N 限速机制。
+- 三类独立采样率：`request_sample_rate`、`access_sample_rate`、`diagnostic_sample_rate`（各 0.0–1.0，默认 1.0=全量保留）

layers.title: Sampler regression coverage
layers.summary: The test layer replaces old rate-limiter tests with unit, integration, access-facade, config, random-distribution, RPC metadata, and system tests. Existing logging and performance tests are adjusted to validate the new sampler and lazy access-recording behavior.

bcFindings.evidence: include/datasystem/utils/embedded_config.h removes `EmbeddedConfig &LogRateLimit(int limit);` from the public embedded config header and replaces it with `RequestSampleRate`, `AccessSampleRate`, and `DiagnosticSampleRate`.

src/datasystem/protos/share_memory.proto changes field 24 from `int32 log_rate_limit = 24;` to `LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config = 24;`, changing the generated accessor name and wire type for the existing tag.

src/datasystem/common/log/access_recorder.h removes the public `Record(StatusCode, const std::string&, const RequestParam&, ...)`, `Record(int, const std::string&, const RequestParam&, ...)`, and stream `Record(StatusCode, const StreamRequestParam&, const StreamResponseParam&)` overloads in favor of typed facade objects.

src/datasystem/common/log/access_recorder.h removes the public constructor `explicit AccessRecorder(std::string keyName);`; callers must now use an `AccessRecorderKey` and the object/stream/request-out facade factories.
src/datasystem/common/log/access_recorder.h deletes the `AccessRecorderStreamWrap` struct and replaces its RAII stream recording pattern with `StreamAccessRecorder`.

src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/log_rate_limiter.h is deleted, removing the public `LogRateLimiter` class and its methods such as `Instance`, `ShouldLog`, `SetRate`, `GetOrCreateRequestDecision`, and `Reset`.

summary: This PR replaces first-N request log limiting with a unified random LogSampler spanning request, access, and diagnostic logs, including config/proto propagation, lazy access recording, call-site migration, docs, and tests.
